steps.t: Rísti Graver can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should talk to Rísti Graver.
The Jewel of Masal may be found somewhere in the Pit of Stonejaws. You should seek out the plaque referencing the Jewel of Masal.
The Plaque of Masal can be found in the Pit of Stonejaws. You should examine the Plaque of Masal.
